summary: Comprehensive testing of GPI Document Hub - Customer Inventory Ledger Module. All 17 backend API tests passed via pytest. All frontend UI tests passed via Playwright.
passed_tests: GET /api/inventory-ledger/customers - returns list of customer workspaces (Hormel/Karlin seeded)
POST /api/inventory-ledger/customers - creates new workspace with negative_balance_policy
GET /api/inventory-ledger/customers/{id} - returns customer details
GET /api/inventory-ledger/customers/{id}/balances - returns derived balances with on_hand, incoming, committed, available, is_short, is_low
Balance derivation math verified: SPAM-12OZ GPI-MAIN = 600 on_hand, 300 incoming, 200 committed, 700 available
Shortage detection: SPAM-LITE shows is_short=true with negative available
GET /api/inventory-ledger/customers/{id}/summary - returns summary counts (total_items, total_on_hand, shortage_count etc)
GET /api/inventory-ledger/customers/{id}/movements - returns movement history (immutable ledger)
POST /api/inventory-ledger/customers/{id}/movements - creates movement with all types (receipt, order_commitment, etc)
POST /api/inventory-ledger/customers/{id}/movements with order_commitment on warn_only customer - succeeds with warning
POST /api/inventory-ledger/customers/{id}/movements with order_commitment on block_commitment customer - returns 422 when exceeding available
POST /api/inventory-ledger/customers/{id}/incoming - creates incoming supply record
PUT /api/inventory-ledger/customers/{id}/incoming/{supply_id} - updates status (expected->in_transit->received)
POST /api/inventory-ledger/customers/{id}/seed - batch seeds opening balances
GET /api/inventory-ledger/meta - returns valid enums (movement_types, source_types, ownership_types)
Frontend: /inventory-ledger page shows customer selector cards with policy badges
Frontend: Click customer card opens workspace with summary strip (Items Tracked, On Hand, Incoming, Committed, Shortages)
Frontend: Balance table shows item/warehouse/ownership/quantities with STATUS badges (SHORT/OK)
Frontend: Movements tab shows movement history with type badges and color-coded qty deltas
Frontend: Incoming tab shows incoming supply with status badges and action buttons (In Transit, Received)
Frontend: New Movement dialog opens with all required fields and submits correctly
Frontend: Add Incoming dialog opens with all required fields and submits correctly
Frontend: Create Customer dialog opens with Name/Code/Policy fields
Frontend: Balance search filter works correctly
Frontend: Back button navigates to customer selector
Frontend: Refresh button reloads data
Frontend: Inventory Ledger nav item appears in sidebar
seed_data_used: Hormel (warn_only policy): SPAM-12OZ, SPAM-LITE, DINTY-15OZ across GPI-MAIN/GPI-WEST with movements (opening_balance, receipt, order_commitment). Karlin (block_commitment policy): COFFEE-LB. Incoming supply: 300 SPAM-12OZ expected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer Inventory Ledger module testing complete. Key endpoints: GET/POST /api/inventory-ledger/customers for workspaces, GET /api/inventory-ledger/customers/{id}/balances for derived balances (balance derivation via MongoDB aggregation), POST /api/inventory-ledger/customers/{id}/movements for ledger entries (immutable), POST /api/inventory-ledger/customers/{id}/incoming for supply tracking, POST /api/inventory-ledger/customers/{id}/seed for bulk import. Negative balance policies work correctly: warn_only allows over-commitment with warning, block_commitment returns 422. Frontend at /inventory-ledger with tabs for Balances, Movements, Incoming. Email service is MOCKED.

backend.derived_balances: on_hand, incoming, committed, available, is_short, is_low - computed from movement ledger via MongoDB aggregation
backend.movement_ledger: Immutable entries - opening_balance, receipt, order_commitment, order_release, manual_adjustment, transfer, writeoff, correction
backend.meta_endpoint: Returns valid enums for frontend dropdowns

frontend.customer_selector: Cards with name, code, policy badge, New Customer button
frontend.customer_workspace: Summary strip (5 metrics), 3 tabs (Balances, Movements, Incoming), back navigation, refresh
frontend.balance_table: 9 columns with ownership badges, qty formatting, SHORT/LOW/OK status badges, search filter
frontend.movement_table: 10 columns with type badges, color-coded qty deltas (+green/-red), reference links
frontend.incoming_table: 8 columns with status badges, action buttons for status transitions
frontend.dialogs: New Movement (12 fields), Add Incoming (9 fields), Create Customer (3 fields)
